description: Prove that if n ≤ m, then n ≤ m + 1, by induction on the proof of n ≤ m.
statement: theorem Nat.le_succ_of_le {n m : Nat} (h : n ≤ m) : n ≤ m + 1
notes: From fp-lean examples/Examples/ProgramsProofs/Inequalities.lean lines 475-480. Ground-truth proof: induction h with | refl => constructor; constructor | step => constructor; assumption
